name: AREthReleaseConsumedServiceInstance
title: AREthReleaseConsumedServiceInstance
description: Deletes a Consumed Service Instance that was created by AREthCreateConsumedServiceInstance.

The objects assigned to the Service Instance (Eventgroups, Events, fields, and methods) are deleted when the Service Instance is closed. If the Service Instance is newly created, all objects must also be newly created.

parameters.name: csiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Consumed Service Instance to be deleted.
